WHIPPLE BROOK RAPIDLY ROSE AND WENT OVER ITS BANK... FLOODING A NUMBER OF FIELDS. IT ALSO FLOWED OVER LOST NATION ROAD AND WASHED OUT THE SHOULDER OF THE ROAD. HIGHWAY MANAGER SAID FILL WAS NEEDED IN SEVERAL AREAS ALONG LOST NATION ROAD.
A SMALL BROOK THAT FLOWS THROUGH WAUMBEK GOLF COURSE RAPIDLY OVERFLOWED ITS BANKS AND WASHED OUT CART PATHS AND FLOODED SEVERAL FAIRWAYS.

HIGHWAY MANAGER IN JEFFERSON... NH NOTED THAT THE SHOULDER WAS WASHED OUT IN SEVERAL LOCATIONS ALONG RT 115A... RT 115 AND SEVERAL BACK ROADS. MILL BROOK OVERFLOWED ITS BANKS NEAR THE RT 115 AND 115A INTERSECTION... BUT NO DAMAGE WAS CAUSED TO THE ROAD ITSELF.

2.37 INCHES OF RAIN FELL AT KCON IN ABOUT 45 MINUTES. POLICE REPORTS RAPIDLY FLOWING WATER ON STREETS IN CONCORD...INCLUDING I-93. MANHOLE COVERS POPPING OFF.
AT EXIT 13 OFF I93 THERE WERE SEVERAL CARS TAKING IN WATER AND SOME VEHICLES WERE FLOATING. A LARGE SINKHOLE FORMED NEAR EXIT 13.
AT EXIT 13 OFF I93 THERE WERE SEVERAL CARS TAKING IN WATER AND SOME VEHICLES WERE FLOATING. THERE WERE ALSO MULTIPLE ACCIDENTS NOTED ON I93 DUE TO PONDING WATER.
TREES DOWN IN WEARE. 1400 PEOPLE WITHOUT POWER.

EDGES OF SEVERAL ROADS AND SHOULDERS WASHED OUT. SOME ROADS WERE UNDERCUT AND HIGH DEPT IS BRINGING IN FILL. PARTS OF SEVERAL BACK DIRT ROADS WERE WASHED OUT AND FILL IS NEEDED... HIGHWAY MANAGER SAID PROBABLY AT LEAST A WEEK TO MAKE ALL REPAIRS.

EXACT SAME CONDITIONS WERE DESCRIBED BY DEERING HIGHWAY MANAGER AS BENNINGINGTON...WITH EDGES OF SEVERAL ROADS AND SHOULDERS WASHED OUT. SOME ROADS WERE UNDERCUT AND HIGH DEPT IS BRINGING IN FILL. PARTS OF SEVERAL BACK DIRT ROADS WERE WASHED OUT AND FILL IS NEEDED. DURING THE EVENT SEVERAL ROADS WERE ONLY DOWN TO ONE LANE WITH WATER OVER THEM.
TOWN HIGHWAY SUPERINTENDENT REPORTED MULTIPLE SHOULDER WASHOUTS THAT HAD TO BE CONED OFF. ALSO... MENTIONED DAMAGE TO SEVERAL DIRT ROADS WHERE FILL IS NEEDED FOR REPAIR.
